biological_replicate: In islets from 7 nondiabetic subjects (mean Hb A1c 5.1%) and 4 diabetic subjects (mean Hb A1c 7.0%)
technical_replicate: separation into multiple culture replicates and assessment of insulin secretion
experimental_design: APT1 knockdown in nondiabetic islets caused insulin hypersecretion
